display_name: 米奇喵 1.21 基础测试整合包
summary: MMCL Phase 1 fixture: Sodium + Fabric API + REI + Indium (Deprecated) + Soft Imprints (Pending)
description:
This is a minimal modpack used as a fixture during MMCL Phase 1 implementation of the modpack source ecosystem. It is NOT the final '米奇喵 基础美化包'. See https://github.com/WangSimiao2000/MiaoMinecraftLauncher/blob/main/docs/modpack-source-phase1-spec.md for the design spec.

Two fixtures demonstrate non-Compatible status branches:
- **Indium** is declared `deprecated_after: 1.21.1` because its author stopped updating after Sodium 1.21.2 made it redundant (FRAPI is now built into Sodium). The resolver will mark it Deprecated on 1.21.4/1.21.5/1.21.7 and skip installation entirely.
- **Soft Imprints** is a real-world Pending fixture: its author is actively releasing for 1.21.1 and 1.21.11 but skipped 1.21.4/1.21.5/1.21.7, so the resolver will mark it Pending (still recently updated, just no version for the chosen MC).
